items.name_cn:
25C Lunch Box Bag
The 19 was really recalled! Haven't seen a 6 yet. The lunch box is quite nice; if you didn't have a similar style before, you could consider getting one (detachable shoulder strap, which is good). The backpack in my impression is a replica, it came out a long time ago. It is light and good-looking to wear, and the key is that it fits the back very well.
Size: 21.5-19-6
Model: cc1015

items.name_cn:
25P mini Panda🐼 color shoulder bag
The mini shoulder bag fits my aesthetic perfectly. Made of lambskin with a quilted design. Features a small front pocket with no unnecessary details. Despite its small size, it fits a phone, lipstick, compact, tissues, and other small items. More importantly, it offers multiple carrying styles: backpack, shoulder bag, crossbody, handbag, etc. You can carry it however you like.
size:22*18*10cm99473

items.name_cn:
265bag mini
The mini size makes the 25bag more exquisite! The hobo's inherent lazy, relaxed vibe; don't let the name 'mini' fool you, the practicality is a pleasant surprise! Easily fits keys and other daily essentials, the side flap pocket is handy for transit cards, and the opening is super convenient. Even for 160cm petite frames, it doesn't look bulky; the shoulder carry hits right at the waistline, perfect for proportions. Jennie looks amazing in it, vintage and casual, pairing with a 🧥 makes for effortlessly stylish looks!
Size: 20*22*12.5cm
No.: 5631 mini Blue Denim
